sortedEvents.name: Hackathon Llama Impatto Roma
sortedEvents.description:
🌍 Affronta le sfide sociali del nostro tempo grazie alle funzionalità avanzate del modello Llama 3.1, imparando e collaborando insieme ai nostri mentors e agli esperti di Meta e dei principali leader del settore dell’IA.

🚀 Accetta la sfida: come sfruttare l'intelligenza artificiale per migliorare il benessere generale dei cittadini, affrontando aree chiave come la salute, i servizi sociali, l’ambiente, i trasporti, la pubblica sicurezza e il dialogo con la pubblica amministrazione.

📅 Unisciti a noi online o di persona presso la sede di Meta Binario F a Roma dal 29 novembre al 1 dicembre. L’evento è dedicato esclusivamente alle persone che vivono in Italia.

🌍 Il supporto sarà disponibile sia in inglese che in italiano.

🏆 Puoi ricevere fino a $5.000 in premi e l'opportunità di ampliare il tuo progetto ad alto impatto sociale e partecipare al programma esclusivo ‘Llama Impact Grant’!

⭐ I 2 team vincenti potranno partecipare a un esclusivo programma di incubazione digitale Meta & lablab NEXT e saranno invitati, a nostre spese, per 2 giorni a visitare i centri di ricerca internazionali e incontrare gli esperti Meta.

⭐ L’iniziativa è patrocinata dall’Agenzia per l'Italia Digitale (AGID), dall’Agenzia per la Cybersicurezza Nazionale (ACN) e dal Dipartimento di Ingegneria dell’Informazione, Elettronica e Telecomunicazioni dell’Università di Roma, La Sapienza (DIET).

 🏆 La cerimonia di premiazione si svolgerà lunedì 2 dicembre alle ore 17:00 a Binario F, e prevede la partecipazione di alti rappresentanti istituzionali, di AgID, di ACN, e del Ministero delle Imprese e del Made in Italy.

Build with Phi-2, Microsoft’s new language model powered by impressive NLP which gained recognition from over 300k users 🔥

🕒 24 hours to complete the challenge
💡 Implement any idea that uses Phi-2 in its core
🤝 Take part alone or form a team with other participants
🚀 The final project can be used for your portfolio, and the startup application to the Slingshot accelerator

sortedEvents.name: NextGen GPT AI Hackathon
sortedEvents.description:
🚀 Access Models with Clarifai Get access to advanced models released by OpenAI recently through Clarifai platform!

Build with the Latest Technology Today - GPT-4(Vision),  Assistants API, Text to Speech, GPT-4 Turbo, Image Generation DALL·E API!

sortedEvents.name: Mixtral 8x7B: 24 Hours Challenge
sortedEvents.description:
At this event, you are challenged to create your own product with the Mixtral 8x7B LLM that overperformed GPT 3.5, and Llama 2 70B on most of the benchmarks.

🕒 24 hours to complete the challenge
💡 Implement any idea that uses Mixtral 8x7B in its core
🤝 Take part alone or form a team with other participants
🚀 The final project can be used for your portfolio, and the startup application to the Slingshot accelerator

sortedEvents.name: Accelerate & Innovate: 2023 Year-End Hackathon
sortedEvents.description:
🚀 Join our 2023 WrapUp Hackathon to turn your AI ideas into reality!

🌟 The 5 finalists will be eligible for an interview with the accelerator's team for the evaluation of their product and to define the next steps
💡 Utilize the technology of any of the providers we collaborated with over 2023 to enhance your creations.
⏳ 2 weeks of intensive building for your Proof of Concept.
🔄 We welcome projects from 2023 Hackathons to be improved and accelerated with lablab.ai!

sortedEvents.name: Gemini AI Hackathon
sortedEvents.description:
Step into the future of AI: Experience and innovate with the cutting-edge Gemini AI model.
First-hand Experience: Dive into the latest AI technology with Gemini AI, right after its release.
Elevate your AI knowledge and coding prowess in a stimulating and supportive atmosphere.
Team up with like-minded innovators and tech enthusiasts. You can work solo, or in a team of up to 6 members.
Enhance your LLM apps with TruLens: Use sophisticated evaluation and performance tracking tools for superior output quality.
Note: Dates may change if the Gemini AI model release is postponed by Google Cloud.

sortedEvents.name: Stable Video 24-hours Hackathon
sortedEvents.description:
The Future of Video Creation with Stable Video!
🚀 Creative Possibilities: Stable Video empowers you to transform text and images into dynamic video content.
⏱️ Fast and Efficient: Generate videos in minutes, not hours.
🌐 Versatile Applications: Explore various fields, from entertainment to marketing.

sortedEvents.name: TruEra Challenge: Build LLM Applications
sortedEvents.description:
Revolutionize AI with TruLens by TruEra - Your Gateway to Building Better LLM Applications!

Build with TruLens, LLMs development and explainability tool by TruEra
Leverage AI observability for dynamic app enhancement
Collaborate with like-minded individuals! For the Hackathon you can work in a team from 1 to 6 members.

In this Hackathon, you can also join with a project from the TruLens 48-Hours Hackathon, provided you adhere to the following rules. Consider it a warm-up, and explore the world of technology by participating in the TruLens 48-Hours Hackathon.

sortedEvents.name: Yi 200k context window LLMs Hackathon
sortedEvents.description: Explore the power of Yi series models in the Yi-6B and Yi-34B variations, featuring a context window of 200K for innovative language-based applications.

sortedEvents.name: Custom GPTs 48-hours Hackathon
sortedEvents.description:
Join the world’s first Custom GPTs Hackathon to create your own AI tools!
Innovate with GPTs: Explore the possibilities of creating custom versions of ChatGPT for specific tasks or purposes.
No Coding Required: Anyone can build their own GPT; coding skills are not necessary.
Hands-on Experience: The primary benefit of this Hackathon is the opportunity to gain practical, hands-on experience with OpenAI's GPT technology.
Educational Focus: Use this event as an educational journey to understand the capabilities and applications of GPTs.

sortedEvents.name: Multimodal Hackathon
sortedEvents.description:
Welcome to the 3-day event that brings together developers, data scientists, and AI enthusiasts to explore the capabilities of Fuyu-8B and LLaVA, two cutting-edge models in the world of multimodal AI.

🤖 Fuyu-8B: Unleash the potential of Fuyu-8B, a multi-modal transformer, to tackle image-related tasks and fine-grained image understanding with rapid response times.
🤯 LLaVA: Dive deep into LLaVA, a chatbot with a focus on language and vision, excelling in science question-answering and versatile applications in multimodal AI.
💡 Challenge: Choose any industry, identify unique business challenges, and create innovative AI prototypes.
🌟 Startup Opportunity: Top performers may secure entry into prestigious startup accelerator programs like GAIA and Slingshot.

sortedEvents.name: TruLens Hackathon
sortedEvents.description: TruLens provides a robust suite of tools for neural network development and monitoring, including LLMs. You can utilize TruLens-Eval for evaluation and TruLens-Explain for deep learning explainability, independently. Explore these valuable tools while taking on the challenge!

🌐 Collaborate Globally: Team up with AI enthusiasts worldwide.

sortedEvents.name: Stable LM 3B 24-hours Hackathon
sortedEvents.description: Stable LM 3B is a revolutionary language model with 3 billion parameters that brings high-performance AI to smart devices. Test the model yourself in the listed challenge categories!

sortedEvents.name: RAG: LLMs with your data
sortedEvents.description:
Discover RAG: Enhance LLMs with fresh, trusted data using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
Vectara's Power: Explore Vectara, the all-in-one platform for innovative AI integration.
Get Started: Dive into the week-long Hackathon Challenge and craft RAG-based applications.
Choose Your Challenge: Opt for Customer Support, Legal Space, Financial Services, or Healthcare to showcase your skills.
Join us in taking AI innovation to new heights.

sortedEvents.name: AutoGen 24-hours Hackathon
sortedEvents.description: Join the AutoGen 24-hours Hackathon to explore AutoGen, a framework for developing customizable LLM applications using conversational agents that seamlessly integrate human input. Discover endless possibilities by combining LLMs, human interaction, and tools. Your innovation starts here!

sortedEvents.name: Falcon LLMs Hackathon sponsored by GAIA
sortedEvents.description: Join us for an exhilarating 4-days hackathon centered around Falcon LLMs, a cutting-edge language model. The hackathon is sponsored by GAIA, the leading startup acceleration program, providing participants with the opportunity to apply for the next cohort and build innovative companies in Saudi Arabia.

sortedEvents.name: AutoGPT Arena Hacks
sortedEvents.description:
🤖 You have 4 weeks to build. Join in at any point!
🌐 Connect with a global tech community.
🎉 Win from a $30,000 cash prize pool.
💾 The winning agent will become the AutoGPT in the 150000 star repository!
🚀 You may continue your startup journey after the Hackathon!
🖥️  Utilize Weaviate as the vector database for your agent with open access.

sortedEvents.name: Legal AI Challenge
sortedEvents.description: Craft an inventive application, tool, or interactive feature that utilizes Legal AI to address legal challenges and revolutionize the industry!

sortedEvents.name: Mistral 7B 24-Hours Hackathon

sortedEvents.name: AI Challenge with GPT-3.5, Codex, DALL-E, and Whisper API
sortedEvents.description:
🗓️ Join us for a week of innovation and excitement on October 16
💻 Harness the power of cutting-edge AI tools to create groundbreaking applications.
💡 Learn from industry-leading AI experts.
⚒️ Combine the power of GPT-3.5, Codex, DALL-E 2, and Whisper to craft your AI masterpiece.
🐱‍💻 Register now to embark on this AI journey with us!

sortedEvents.name: Open Interpreter Hackathon
sortedEvents.description: Open Interpreter is a locally running implementation of OpenAI's Code Interpreter, Open Interpreter lets you run code (Python, Javascript, Shell, etc.) through a natural-language interface in your terminal, empowering you to automate tasks, analyze data, create content, and more with ease.

sortedEvents.name: Fine-Tuning 24-hours Challenge
sortedEvents.description: Fine-tuning is a technique that empowers pre-trained models to perform specific tasks or behaviors, opening up a world of possibilities for customization and specialization. sortedEvents.name: SeamlessM4T 24-hours Hackathon

sortedEvents.description: A new text-to-image model called Stable Diffusion is set to change the game once again ⚡️. Stable Diffusion is a latent diffusion model that is capable of generating detailed images from text descriptions. It can also be used for tasks such as inpainting, outpainting, and image-to-image translations. Join us for a epic stable diffusion makers event 11-13 November 👊

sortedEvents.name: Transformers AI Online Hackathon
sortedEvents.description:
Transformers are context-learning neural networks. They learn by tracking relationships in sequential data, for example, words in sentences. You might know them as some of the best AI models in the market - OpenAI’s GPT-3 and Cohere

In our 3-day Hackathon, organized along with the Swiss AI Association, you’ll use context-learning neural networks to build solutions with people from all around the globe and have an opportunity to pitch your AI Prototypes worldwide. Jump in to learn more about harnessing the power of Transformers!

sortedEvents.description: Join us for a hackathon where we will be using OpenAI Whisper to create innovative solutions! We will be using this tool to create applications that can transcribe in multiple languages, as well as translate from those languages into English. This will be a great opportunity for you to learn more about speech processing and to create some useful applications!
